FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Yield Differential Expansion Fuels Bullish Bias; Technical Support Intact
tldr_points: Surging global bond yields widen rate differential, supporting USD against JPY
Technical structure remains constructive with MA20 acting as dynamic support
FX option expiry at 10am NY cut may induce volatility; positioning for directional move
FX.excerpt: Yield spread expansion drives USD/JPY higher; buy dips toward MA20 support
FX.comment: Yield spread expansion and technical support at MA20 support bullish bias

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] FLAT: Technical Plateaus Amid Stagnant Economic Drivers
tldr_points: S&P 500 consolidating on flat technical grounds
Macro data shows weak upside potential
Trading strategy focuses on neutral entry with tight risk
STOCKS.excerpt: Flat outlook for the S&P 500 due to technical consolidation and muted fundamental growth.
STOCKS.comment: Flat technical environment with weak fundamental catalysts

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] DOWN: AI Detects Resistance at MA20 Amid Macro Pressure
tldr_points: MA20 shows a key resistance zone
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD faces a likely pullback to MA20 amid heightened geopolitical risk and bullish RSI signals.
